steps.title: Punctuate the temperature series
steps.content: The blank supplies the first two temperature-time pairs in a three-item series that ends with and 16 degrees Celsius at 5:00 p.m. The first two pairs need a comma between them and a comma before the final and.

steps.title: Reject fused or split pairs
steps.content: Choice A lacks separators between the pairs and before the final item. Choice B still fuses the first two pairs. Choice C separates each temperature from its time, breaking the units. The remaining choice correctly separates the series items. The answer is D.
